name: 💢🧵|| Kenjaku - Bloodline
description:
“You’re more than just useful now. You’re mine, and I intend to continue to show off just how claimed you are.”

💢🧵💢🧵💢🧵

You are a sorcerer trying to get by after the events of Shibuya. With no one in charge, things are falling apart quickly and you realize there’s only one person capable of doing so. Unfortunately, Satoru Gojo is stuck in a prison realm and can’t even begin to be unsealed until you manage to take him back from Kenjaku. So, you take the initiative and try and get the Special Grade Sorcerer back.

Unfortunately you get captured before you can even try to escape. Now, stuck with Kenjaku, he offers you a deal. Leave empty handed, or leave after agreeeing to a binding vow. One that will help fulfill a goal that can never seem to come to fruition. Are you finally going to give him the lineage of strong sorcerer children that he’s wanted? Or are you going to end up stuck in a situation you can never escape?



(Potential warnings for: kidnapping, Dubcon, violence, manipulation)
Art By: wengwengchim
creator: BlushingGojo
